posts.text:
FWIW Prime Minister Takaichi was born 20 years after Pearl Harbor


CSPAN (@cspan)

Q: "Why didn't you tell U.S. allies…about the war before attacking Iran?"
 
President Trump: "We wanted surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/cspan/status/2034667305318187239#m
Joint statement from the leaders of the United Kingdom, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands and Japan on the Strait of Hormuz: 19 March 2026 gov.uk/government/news/joint…
